name: Liver and Onions
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice liver to 1/4 to 1/2-inch thick.
2. Cut liver into serving pieces.
3. Mix onions, oil, pepper and sage in a 1-quart casserole dish.
4. Cover and microwave on high until onions are crisp tender (4 to 6 minutes).
5. Brush liver with soy sauce. Arrange thickest pieces on the outside of a 9-inch pie plate. Spoon onions evenly over liver.
6. Cover tightly and microwave on high for 3 minutes; turn the pie plate one-half turn.
7. Microwave until liver is no longer pink, 1 to 3 minutes (do not overcook). Let stand 3 minutes.
8. Sprinkle with lemon juice and parsley just before serving.
